J’aime beaucoup le style arcade de Rematch, avec une bonne dose de technicité, ce qui le rend à la fois accessible et intéressant à maîtriser. Les modes 3v3, 4v4 et 5v5 sont bien pensés et vraiment fun à jouer, surtout en équipe. Dommage qu’il n’y ait pas de mode classé (ranked) pour le 3v3 et le 4v4, car ces formats mériteraient aussi une vraie compétition, pas seulement le 5v5.
En tout cas, une très bonne surprise pour les amateurs de jeux dynamiques en équipe.

Привет!
Хочу поделиться впечатлениями об игре Rematch. 
Прежде всего хотелось бы отметить тот момент, что я много играл в игру Rocket League (1809 часов), изначально мне показалось, что они очень похожи, но Rematch — совсем другая история. И хотя многие сравнивают эти две игры, между ними есть существенные отличия. (нет машинок, ха!)

Ознакомился с обзорами, многие пишут, что порог вхождения в Rematch очень низкий и быстрый, но у меня, после 7 часов игры (для кого-то может мало) , еще не получилось полностью освоиться с управлением. 
Само управление требует привыкания, особенно на геймпаде, а механика приема мяча и пасов иногда кажется кривой и нестабильной.

Игра "Rematch" предлагает уникальный командный футбол с командами по 3-5 игроков и динамичными матчами длительностью 6 минут. В игре есть желание побеждать, и лично я получаю удовольствие от побед, хотя часто встречаются очень опытные игроки (задроты) 

Однако у игры есть и минусы. В первую очередь — недостаток контента. 
Сейчас доступны только товарищеские и рейтинговые матчи, а турниров или мини-игр пока нет. Кроме того, встречаются технические проблемы: лаги, вылеты и сетевые баги, которые портят впечатление. 

Я очень надеюсь, что игра будет развиваться и онлайн никуда не пропадет.
Спасибо, что ознакомился с данным обзором  🖤

Generally a fun game. I was not expecting to like a soccer game this much. It is really fun with friends and has a solid foundation for competitiveness.

Here is the good:
Solid tutorials and easy to learn controls.
Satisfying opportunities to make outplays against your opponents
The environment can be used to create new opportunities - like bouncing be the ball off the wall back to yourself.
Understandable monetization - Although, I don't plan to spend any extra. The shop and pass system is not overly complicated and doesn't have too many different credits.

Some minor complaints:
I have had some dsync issues. The ball sometimes does not match inputs or magically gets replaced into a position unexpectedly.
Some crashes. My game will crash after I get a goal myself or right after I assist someone. 
Bugs:
1. Being stuck in defender stance, which makes you unavailable to receive a pass. 
2. Character turns into a ghost and is unable to receive the ball but is able to kick it sometimes. Similar to the defender stance, but I was able to sprint and everything. But the ball was going through me, when I started as the goalie the ball just slide through my hands. It has happened to me twice.

Overall, I want game to succeed.

Viven en un country, andan en computadoras AlienWare para arriba, los fines de semana se compran los mejores componentes de CPU, morfan bien todos los días. El día anterior al partido, se sentaron tranquilamente en una silla gamer cinco estrellas y se rascaron la verrrrrrga durante veinticuatro horas sin hacer nada, jugando al fifa, al fortnite y a la Play. Juegan videojuegos todos los días de su vida. ¿Los controles? 6000 dólares, 5000 pe… no sé cuánto salen, ponele 3000 mangos, 4000 mangos.

Están estables por una conexión perfecta de internet, están bien comidos, están bien entrenados, los procesadores; que son las que no te cortan los frame rates, las pantallas; que son los que no te raspan los colores, la refrigeración; es la que te estira todo el sistema, la que no sobrecalienta, la que sale a 800 pesos… ¡No sé cuánto sale un ventilador para jugar a los jueguitos!

¡La pelota es perfecta, PERFECTA! 120 poligonos. Procesada con un modelo 3D a 8 bares. La cancha no tiene un solo bug, el arco tiene siete metros, veinte por dos cuarenta renderizado. Te aplauden las animaciones cuando salís a la cancha…

¡LA CONCHA DE TU MADRE NO SABÉS PASAR UNA PELOTA! LE VAS A PEGAR AL ARCO Y DESDE EL PUNTO PENAL, LA TIRÁS ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥. Le vas a hacer un pase a tu compañero que está a un metro y la haces así y se la pasas mal, te ponés la skin de Ronaldinho y ni regatear un palo parado sabes. ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥, eso me puede pasar a mí con esta computadora de ♥♥♥♥♥♥, pero no a vos. Y vos, otro ♥♥♥♥♥♥, que vas y le pagás el acceso anticipado, como un ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ y te ♥♥♥♥♥ de frío de dinero y decís: "dale me”, “dale xi”, dale co”, “dale tri”, e' putooo, ♥♥♥♥♥♥ soy re pija porque voy a la tienda de steam.

Im sorry, but...Whoever programmed controls for KBM should move on to different job. Maybe there is some appeal to blind passes, but for a new player? its just HORRIBLE - and I wouldve been fine IF there was a chance to remap it. And worst thing is - its counter intuitive. You have to shoot in the direction where you look at with mouse, and maybe curve shots...I am not the fan of it, but its easy to adapt. But with passes, it suddenly works completely differently? The controls on KBM here are awful - which wasnt the case for any football game I played, where basic stuff was mostly easy to understand in an hour. 

Props for regional prices though - ultra based to buy the game for less than 20 bucks.

The game is a lot of fun, especially when you're playing with friends. Over time, servers and content will improve. However, in my opinion, there are two major issues that need urgent attention:

1. Crashes and Connection Issues – These were never a problem during the beta, but now the game crashes and disconnects from the server quite frequently. This needs to be fixed as soon as possible. Experiencing these issues repeatedly really kills the enjoyment and makes you want to stop playing.

2. KBM Controls – Since the game requires quick environmental awareness, fast reactions, and accurate aiming, I believe it's more comfortable to play with keyboard and mouse — at least that's what works best for me. However, passing — especially lob passes — is terrible with KBM. I've been put in tough situations during critical moments of matches because of this. Controller players can easily perform quick passes and lob passes with ease. whereas for me, the passing mechanic is reduced to just the left mouse button, which is very limiting.

Finally something new and fresh for the gaming community!
Every anime fan and soccer fan has been dreaming of a game like this — and SLOCLAP actually delivered. It’s super fun to play with friends, especially because you can coordinate creative plays. The mechanics allow for a lot of variety, but I’ll admit it’s harder when playing solo (a lot of players wanna be the “EGOISTA” 😅).

I’ve already put in 100+ hours if you count the beta, and honestly… I just can’t stop playing.

That said, here are some of the issues I’ve noticed:

Desync: SLOCLAP has worked hard to fix it, and it’s improved a bit — but it’s still there.

Lag: I usually play on 40ms, sometimes 80ms. Oddly enough, the 40ms servers can feel more unstable at times than the 80ms ones.

Solo Queue: Like I mentioned earlier, SoloQ can be rough. Most players just want to score on their own, dribbling and shooting from midfield instead of playing as a team.

Goalkeeper issues: The lag is especially noticeable in goal. Sometimes the ball just goes through you, even when you hear the catch sound or see the animation trigger.

P.S. I still totally recommend the game to any football fan, anime fan, or anyone just curious to try something new. SLOCLAP has promised more content and fixes (servers, desync, etc.), and honestly, even if I hadn’t gotten the game for free — I would’ve bought it anyway

Give it a few weeks and see if things have improved. As of right now all paid players are just beta testers.

The game as of today is very bad. Just within an hour I experience so many bugs it just makes me angry. RB+A/R1+X after a nerf in the Open Beta is once again broken being the most important thing when you need to dribble past someone, it is so reliable that 99% of the time works, but now because of that the defending is way harder meaning attacking is less technical and less teamwork based and more casual. Meanwhile tackles have been nerfed too and at the same time new shooting techniques are discovered and the worst thing is that they became the only tech people use to score in game.
Other bugs are:
-People Crashing on the second goal of a match
-Keepers can still touch the ball with their hands outside the goalkeeper area
-Player customization so bugged that items disappear, or sometimes some items get a "XXX" price, modification to your player never save(you need to exit the menu and re-open it), colors in game DON'T MATCH with what you selected, like bro please PATCH THIS, the only thing you have as customization is either long sleeves/short sleeves or COLORS, PATCH IT.
-Some goal celebrations crash the game resulting in an incredible unreal crash report.
Lastly the last patch regarding the region selection in the option menu didn't do what it was for, you keep getting Auto-selection. Fix your game.

Lançaram o jogo totalmente inacabado. Bugs pra todo lado, não tem crossplay, não tem player base e não acha partida, lag, jogo dessincronizado, crasha toda hora...

Isso só de problema pra rodar o jogo. Mas os problemas não param por aí. Não tem remap de tecla, vc não consegue mudar as teclas do jeito que vc quer. Não tem como montar time em formato de clã, o jogo coloca uniformes com cores parecidas entre os dois times deixando bem ruim de ver durante o jogo, as cores dos "mapas" tão muito ruins, o sistema de passe para quem joga com mouse e teclado é muito ruim...

Enfim, o jogo não está nem em nível de beta e já foi lançado cobrando pra ser jogado. Não vale a pena agora.
Talvez daqui um ou dois anos o jogo esteja bom.

- 作为竞技游戏竟然没有举报和惩罚系统，输俩球就挂机甚至往自己家踢的人你拿他根本没办法。
- 不同界面之间的跳转比较便秘，功能也不完善，经常需要多按很多步。

🔲 Wciągająca jak serial kryminalny
🔲 Epicka jak finał mistrzostw świata

CENA
🔲 Za darmo
✅ Po kilku meczach wiem, że warto – emocje jak na turnieju, a koszt niewielki
🔲 Idealna
🔲 Za drogo
🔲 Szkoda pieniędzy

WYMAGANIA SPRZĘTOWE
🔲 Odpali się na kalkulatorze
✅ Nawet starszy laptop da radę, gra nie wymaga NASA
🔲 Komputer gamingowy zbędny
🔲 NASA, bo czemu nie

DŁUGOŚĆ
🔲 Na szybką partyjkę
✅ Idealna na przerwę – można grać chwilę, ale łatwo się wciągnąć na dłużej
🔲 Przeciętna
🔲 Długa jak maraton szachowy
🔲 Można utopić setki godzin

ZABAWA
🔲 Nuda jak czekanie na ruch przeciwnika
🔲 Powtarzalna jak remisy w szachach
🔲 Całkiem ok
🔲 Może być
✅ Każda partia to emocje, adrenalina i satysfakcja z wygranej – choć czasem aż się gotuje, gdy ktoś gra tylko po to, żeby nie zepsuć rozgrywki i przeciąga każdą turę

PONOWNE OGRYWANIE
🔲 Raz wystarczy
🔲 Może wrócę
✅ Chce się grać jeszcze raz i jeszcze raz – zwłaszcza, gdy przegrasz przez głupi błąd
🔲 Nie mogę przestać

CZY WARTO?
🔲 Nie polecam
✅ Zdecydowanie polecam! Rematch to świetna gra dla fanów rywalizacji i logicznych pojedynków. Trzeba jednak uzbroić się w cierpliwość – czasem trafiają się gracze, którzy wolą nie podejmować ryzyka i psują tempo zabawy. Mimo tego, emocje gwarantowane, a satysfakcja z wygranej – bezcenna!

The game is a 6/10. 

I never watch football (played some FIFA), because I think it's one of the most boring sports to watch. I do however like sport-games, from time-to-time. And we rarely get sport-games on PC, hence why I picked it up.

That game is OK, nothing special. A lot of weird glitches andd bugs that should have been adressed before the launch, or maybe just go Early Access.

The game, for what it is, is expansive as hell. 25€, (yes, a lot more expansive than your ♥♥♥♥♥♥ dollars). On top of that, they have an "Elite Edition", that costs a woping 45€. And on top of that, a battle pass, in-store bundles etc. Why they diddn't make this game F2P is odd, but I guess that only means one thing  - they're greedy as ♥♥♥♥!

Pick it up on a sale. Or wait 6-12 months, when the game has to go F2P to keep making money.

Oh, and by the way. Can we have a good hockey game for PC before we all die of old age? If Saber wont do it, maybe Sloclap wiill?

Si el FIFA Street, el Clubes Pro y Rocket League tuvieran un hijo sería este juego.
Está muy entretenido y, en lo jugable, te saca mucho de la zona de confort en lo que es como jugar un juego de futbol. Los tiros los tenes que hacer apuntando con la cámara, no dependes de subirte stats, no es un gacha espantoso como la el Ultímate team, etc.

клас

Franchement, il y a beaucoup de choses à dire sur le jeu.

Je trouve qu'il est sorti 6 mois trop tôt, voire plus. Il y a un manque terrible de lore où le seul lore qu'on a, c'est la cinématique du début avec le coach. Sinon, il n'y a rien d'autre. Il manque un mode carrière où l'esprit du jeu aurait pu y être, et ça aurait été vraiment cool : où tu rejoins un club, tu joues contre des bots sans prise de tête, etc. Je vais pas vous faire le topo de l'idéologie d'un mode carrière, mais ça manque terriblement de lore sur ça.

Y a encore pas mal de bugs, même si les développeurs les règlent vite, d'autres apparaissent. Lors de la bêta, je n'avais eu aucun crash, alors que là, 1 game sur 10, je crash à cause d’un but. Le multi manque aussi d’événements ou de lore. On peut même pas voir la carte d’un autre joueur. On peut pas signaler (récemment ils ont proposé dans leur serveur d'envoyer un ticket pour toute personne toxique ou qui cheat avec preuve à l’appui avec une vidéo), donc on doit faire leur travail.

C’est chiant car, quand on y pense au potentiel du jeu, on se rend compte que le jeu est sorti trop tôt, où il manque même les clubs, d’autres gestes techniques plus intéressants, de vraies choses... mais bon.

Je pense qu’ils ont sorti le jeu à 25 euros car ils s’imaginent que le jeu vaudra son prix avec, sûrement, toutes les choses que j’ai mentionnées qui manquent au jeu. Personnellement, je trouve qu’à l’état actuel, le jeu ne vaut clairement pas son prix, à la limite 10 euros car il n’y a rien à proposer.

Surtout qu’au début, quand j’ai vu le prix, je me suis dit qu’ils vont proposer des passes gratuits avec beaucoup de contenu qu’on peut débloquer gratuitement, ou ceux qui jouent le plus peuvent le débloquer. Bah finalement non, on paie un jeu 25 euros avec un passe de saison très moyen à 10 euros (donc presque la moitié du prix du jeu de base), et le fonctionnement du passe... mdrr que c’est nul. C’est coupé en 3 phases, on se fait chier au bout d’un moment. À l’heure actuelle, il n’y a rien à faire, même pas de mission hebdomadaire, pas d’événements, et on peut pas débloquer les contenus gratuits du passe de saison car il faut attendre. Surtout que leur passe, on peut débloquer que 300 golds (monnaie pour acheter le passe) en une saison, donc logiquement, il nous faut 4 passes de saison pour pouvoir s’en acheter un. À la limite, le jeu serait gratuit, je ne me serais pas plaint de ce système économique du passe, mais là, avec les 3 millions de ventes qu’ils ont fait, ça aurait été tout de même moins capitaliste de proposer ceci. Ils ont déjà les sous. Surtout que leur boutique est grotesque : un skin Ronaldinho qui coûte 10 euros, mais qu’on ne peut débloquer qu’avec les golds (donc 4 passes de saison finis), c’est très long. Et là récemment, vous avez proposé une collab Puma à 10 euros dans votre boutique. OK, c’est cool le contenu, mais 10 euros, vous êtes sérieux ? Les 3 millions de ventes ne vous ont pas suffi ? Vous ne pouvez pas faire le même modèle économique que Marvel Rivals où les contenus, on peut les acheter avec les golds et une autre monnaie qui se mérite en jouant au jeu.

Enfin bref, malgré tout ce que j’ai dit, le jeu est super fun. Je passe mes meilleurs moments de cette année devant ce jeu. Il est beau, mais il manque beaucoup de choses tout de même. Le jeu, je pense que dans 6 mois, sera incroyable. Je n’ai pas critiqué le problème de crossplatform car c’est leur premier jeu multi crossplatform, donc c’est normal, mais le reste, c’est tout dans leurs compétences. Surtout en ayant joué à SIFU, le mode carrière aurait pu être un classique.

Donc oui, je recommande ce jeu. 25 euros, c’est 2,5 menus tacos, donc faites un régime de fast-food pendant quelques semaines et jouez à ce jeu !

одни краши

Does the game have potential? Yes. In a few years it could be as good as Rocket League.
Do I recommend it right now? Yes … and no.

- Yes – if you realise the game still needs a lot of work and you’re fine with something that isn’t yet close to Rocket League.
- No – if you’re easily frustrated by things that don’t quite work YET.

What requires more work?
- The gameplay is very chaotic, and using a controller feels like finger-gymnastics; after three matches my thumbs are exhausted.
- I never really know when - or why - I have control of the ball. It all feels like ball and players are from a separate world. It doesn't feel realistic.
- The ball desync is frustrating: all the animations feel “baked in,” and the lack of real physics is noticeable. When I doing perfect sliding, the "enemy" player is still moving forward like it's nothing (I have really great internet connection believe me)
- I wish there were bots so I could practise more alone; waiting 5–10 minutes for a match teaches me nothing.
- There should be an option for the camera to follow the ball.
- Shooting should behave like passing: if I push the left stick left and press RB to shoot, the shot should go left, not forward relative to the camera.

I've lost interest in the typical football game format (like FIFA), a long time ago.
This game is a breath of fresh air in this sport category. 

I've waited for a game like this, where it is your skill and tactics that matter, and where, by controlling a single player, you have to make a difference on the pitch. Not only vs the oposing team, but as an element of your team, where you can make the game winning difference, and adapt.

The mechanics of the game and the skill level required, might feel a little hard at first, but you progressively get better at the game, as the game rewards you for your effort in the most satisfying way. The game feels good

Now, there are (were) a lot of bugs and crashes, but I've seen them solve alot of the issues so far.

REMATCH is a super fun, fast-paced arcade football game. The 5v5 matches are nonstop action — no offsides, no fouls, no breaks — so it’s pure chaos in the best way. Controls feel great, and it’s a blast to play, especially with friends. That said, there are some annoying issues: lag, random disconnects, matchmaking bugs, and multiple ball bugs. If you can look past the technical hiccups, REMATCH is a really enjoyable time.

Who’s it for? If you liked Rocket League or just want something fast, competitive, and a little wild, this one's worth checking out.

This game has the potential to become the next rocket league in terms of popularity, but at launch is riddled with game breaking bugs. Many times it has happened to crash on a ranked game that i was winning but the game still counted it as a lost because i got disconnected making me lose 17 points (on a win you get 20). The ball physics sometimes just refuses to work, when two player interact with it at the same time resulting in unexpected behaviour. Lastly the goalkeeper mechanics needs a lot of work, as of right now is too demanding, you need to stay right in the middle of the goal because you are not gonna reach the extremities of it. 
But most important of it all, there isnt a report system!! I cannot belive in 2025 you can make an online without it. This makes me belive they saw the  success of the beta and wanting to capitalize on it they decided to rush the launch of the game, there is no other solution, they wanted money.
they really need to patch a lot of stuff for me to recommend this game to someone. I think the game should not have come out the way is it right now

Rematch is exactly what you want when you fancy a quick, chaotic football kickabout without the fuss of ultra-realistic simulators. Matches are short, frantic, and brimming with hilarious moments. Own goals, last-second screamers, and plenty of shouting at your mates.

It thrives on local multiplayer mayhem. Grab a controller, invite a few friends over (or argue with your siblings), and you’ll instantly see why it’s addictive. It doesn’t pretend to be a tactical masterpiece. Instead, it embraces the fun side of football: outrageous shots, cheeky tackles, and constant opportunities for revenge.

The controls are simple enough for anyone to pick up, yet there’s room for some skillful flicks and unexpected comebacks. It’s basically football distilled into pure party game energy.

If you love games like FIFA Street or Rocket League but wish they were sillier and more unpredictable, Rematch is a brilliant pick for your next game night.

Game is great, I love the concept and the fresh take for futbol/soccer, but the game is definitely still buggy and glitchy. There are legitimately times i blocked a shot and the game registers it as a goal and IT LITERALLY SHOWS THE REPLAY OF ME BLOCKING IT AND IT STILL COUNTS. There are also weird interactions with trying to grab the ball as a goal keeper and also problems with interacting with the ball in general as well as server desyncs where it will show you winning or losing an interaction, but the actual outcome is different. There is also times where the game will just randomly crash for whatever reason. This is to say however the game is amazing, just needs fine tuning and we have possibly the next generation of soccer esports

Ich hab Rematch schon in der Beta ein bisschen gespielt und es macht richtig Laune – Vom Gameplay her erinnerts stark an Rocket League: schnelle Matches, viel Skill-Ceiling, hoher Suchtfaktor.

Empfohlen wird der Controller – so hab ich auch angefangen. Aber überraschenderweise fühl ich mich mit Maus und Tastatur präziser unterwegs. Gerade fürs Zielen und schnelle Richtungswechsel hats für mich besser funktioniert.

Das Spiel glänzt im Multiplayer – besonders mit Freunden. Solo ists auch okay, aber im Squad kommt der richtige Spaß auf. Das Battle-Pass-System wirkt fair. Ich hab aktuell gerade mal den ersten Knoten freigeschaltet und konnte mir schon zwei coole Cosmetics mit der Ingame-Währung holen, ohne noch zusätzlich Geld auszugeben. Grundsätzlich bleibt alles, was man kaufen kann, rein kosmetisch – also keine Pay-to-Win-Sorgen.

Zum Release gabs abends ein paar Server-Lags – vermutlich wegen dem Hype Ansturm. Am nächsten Tag gegen Mittag habe ich nochmal gespielt und da hatte ich keine Lags.

Рематч это файтинг в мире футбола. Просто тыкая кнопочки вы мало чего добьетесь в этой игре. Если вы хотите играть умом и выигрывать оппонента на скилычах,то вам нужен +1 друг хотя бы в команду и Жоское изучение механик пассов, отбитий через стенку, держание позиционки и прочее дерьмо.
Мы первые 3-4 часов жоска сосали и такие же были жалобы как и всех, пинг и т.д. Но после изучения фундоментала игры,то сама игра преобразилась и крайние 2 часа этой игры были супер крутые. Не считая рандомов кто с ворот пасует оппонентам по кд. Поэтому обзоры меньше 50ти часов можно не учитывать. To my suprise it is an uninspired Rocket League ripoff which made me download and play the former rather than REMATCH. What is even funnier, the game has NO REMATCH FUNCTIONALITY lmao. The game's ridden with FOMO free2play content and pricey MTX targeted towards children's favorite footballer stars (starting with a mid Ronaldinho skin for 12USD and 10USD battlepass full of nothing burger with only 70% ingame currency). This game should be free and all purchases should be founder packs which grant us currency. I feel scammed.

As for the emotes, they are ego-centric without actual mechanical interactions between your  assistant (you cannot high five with the person who passed to ya, just celebrate yourself). No toxicity filters, no antismurfing tools means after a month this game will be ridden with sweaty smurfs (mb thats why this game is paid eh?). 

The gameplay itself is enjoyable but overall VERY ROCKET-LEAGUE'y, you even use the same tactics as in the mentioned game to score. This feels like a Chinese knockoff rather than a proper game made by SIFU studio. 

Don't get it on the full price, it should be F2P; I honestly anticipate the devs grant the buyers ingame currency and go to F2P model in the following month. I won't support such scam any further, too bad I can't refund it.

(Oh, and yeah, desyncs and crashes are a thing; I have a high-end PC with 1gb/s bandwith and those things happen once in a few hours, get ready to lose your ranked points!)

Rematch is an absolute blast. Sloclap steps away from martial arts and steps onto the pitch with a bold, fresh take on 5v5 football—and it works.

The matches are fast-paced, skill-driven, and full of clutch moments. Whether you're threading a perfect pass, pulling off a last-second save, or burying a game-winning goal, the game constantly delivers high-energy thrills. It feels like a perfect mix of arcade intensity and competitive depth.

What really stands out is the fluid movement and tight controls. Every player class has a distinct feel, and team play actually matters. You can’t win by just hogging the ball—positioning, awareness, and timing make all the difference. It rewards coordination and creativity, and it’s so satisfying when your team pulls off a clean sequence.

The visual style is sleek and clean, with a futuristic vibe that sets it apart from more traditional football games. And no surprise here—coming from Sloclap, the animations and physics feel incredibly polished.

Whether you're jumping into quick matches or grinding ranked, Rematch has that “just one more game” feeling. It's easy to pick up, hard to master, and ridiculously fun with friends.

If you love fast, competitive sports games with strong teamplay, Rematch is well worth your time.

Türkiye sunucusu açtıklarını iddia ediyorlar, Europe sunucularının bazılarının ismini Turkey olarak değiştirmişler Türkleri bi sunucuya toplamak amaçları. Avrupa sunucusunda kaç ping alıyorsanız aynı pingi alıyorsunuz, tam anlamıyla kolpa. Bir firmanın böyle ucuz yöntemlere başvurmaması gerekir. Ayrıca oyun animasyon üzerine kurulu bir oyun olduğu için ben almıştım ayağımdan gitti top birden gibi olaylar çok yaşanıyor. Hall Effect klavye kullanıyorsanız çok sık bastığınız tuşları görmeme gibi durumlarla karşılaşılıyor. Bunlara ek olarak oyunun kontrollerine çok fena bir RNG faktörü var gibi kalede a basmasam bile bazen sola zıplıyor gibi vesaire. Belki yine HE klavyeden kaynaklanıyordur bilemiyorum. Son olarak söyleyebileceğim şöyle bir sorun daha var: Top size geldiğinde hızlıca fareye tıklayıp vurma animasyonuna bir süre girmiyor ve siz de falso vermek için fareyi sağa veya sola çeviriyorsunuz bu da direkt olarak yönünü değiştirmene neden oluyor, geç animasyona girdiği için de farklı bir yöne vurmuş oluyorsunuz. Bu yüzden top size geldiğinde kısa bir süre beklemeniz gerekiyor ki bu durumla karşılaşmayasınız. Bu durumu çok normal gören arkadaşlar olabilir ancak madem tıkladığım zaman animasyona girmiyor faremi kilitleyip falso ekranı gelmiyor, o zaman kabul etmediği süreçteki fareye tıklamamı da daha sonradan vurmak için kullanmasın. Birçok kez sırf bu yüzden istediğim yöne değil de farklı yönlere vurdum/pas verdim. 
Kısacası oyunun daha çok pişmesi lazım, eğlenceli bir oyun olabilir ancak şu an benim için oynanmayacak kadar random ve kötü.

24 Haziran güncelleme.

Birçok konuda buglar ve kontroller düzeldi ancak hala kaleci iken tuttuğunuz toplar bazen gol oluyor veya animasyona girseniz de topu almayabiliyor. En büyük sorun şu: Sağ click veya F ile pas atarken yönü fare ile veya klavye ile ayarlayabiliyosunuz ancak fareyi ileri de itseniz pas atarken klavyeden WASD'ye basarsanız top o yöne gidebiliyor bu da deneyimi kötüleştiriyor. Ayarlar kısmına klavye/fare/klavye&fare seçmek için ayar eklenmesi lazım, ben tercihen sadece fare ile ayarlamak isterim. Oyunda oyuncuların sağlak veya solak olması durumu yok. Oyuncular şut çektiğinde hep sağ ayakla çekiyor bu de topun birazcık da olsa sağdan çıkmasına neden oluyor. Solak veya sağlak olma tercihi eklenirse oyuna küçük bir çeşitlilik eklenebilir hem de oynanış pek etkilenmemiş olur. Türkiye sunucularına gelirsek genelde 30 pingli sunuculara atıyor artık ama hala Turkey sunucusu olduğunu iddia eden 70-80 pingli sunucular mevcut. Bunlar dışında yoğunluktan kaynaklı olsa gerek sık sık 6-10% packetloss oluyor sunucularda bu da animasyonların vesaire akıcılığını ve oynanışı etkiliyor. Yine de bir önceki inceleme yazdığım zamana göre daha oynanabilir bir oyun bu şekilde düzeltmeye devam ettikleri sürece kitle pozitif kalacaktır. Ben de tavsiye ediyoruma çekiyorum oyumu.

29 Haziran güncelleme.

Oyun epey toparlandı, sunuculardaki gecikme daha düşük olduğundan daha oynanabilir duruyor. Ancak kalecide büyük problemler var. Birincisi kimi zaman topu tutsanız da animasyona girip topu hiç tutmamış gibi topu bırakabiliyor. Bu sık yaşanan bir durum oynadığınızda eminim siz de karşılaşmışsınızdır. İkincisi kalecinin topu yumruklama özelliği yok. Sağ click ile topu yumruklama eklenebilir, nasıl oyuncular sağ clickle kafaya kalkabiliyorsa kaleciler de topu yumruklamaya kalkabilir hatta bunun alanı kafadan daha geniş olabilir. Bu sayede duvardan sektirmeli, kalecinin çaresiz kaldığı pozisyonlarda kaleci için bir şans yaratılabilir. Oyunun en büyük problemi daha önce de bahsettiğim gibi sağ click/F ile yön verme sorunu. Fareyi ittiğinizde veya klavyeden tuşa bastığınızda o yöne atıyor topu ancak siz fareyle ayarlasanız da klavye girdisini random bir şekilde alıp ayarladığınız yönle tamamen alakasız başka bir yöne topu atabiliyor. Bunun için oyun ayarlarına yöne ayarlama modu olarak sadece klavye / sadece fare / ikisi birden gibi seçenekler eklenmeli. Ben şahsen sadece fare ile ayarlamak isterdim bunun için bir ayar gelmesini bekliyorum. Bir diğer konu da oyunda hala bir cezalandırma sistemi yok. Hem oyunbozanlık yapanlar için hem de AFK oyuncular için bir ceza sistemi gerekiyor. Bunun için bir rapor sistemi de eklenmeli bana kalırsa. Oyundaki toksik kitle ne kadar az, oyun o kadar eğlenceli. Ne de olsa bir oyunu eğlenceli kılan ilk şey oyunun kitlesidir.

It`s a very cool football game where every player is controlled by one player.
 Looks a bit like Rocketleague + FIFA.
 The game have less bugs than the beta and you can pass the ball in the direction what you want. Tutorials are more complete now and the goal keeper is more easy to control. The maps don´t lags like before (for now). The game runs more fluid.
 I 100% recommend for chill, have fun, have a game where chill when you don´t know what to play.
 It is adictive and fun!! (A game what don´t makes you a slave of farming with daily/weekly quests for now, just join, play some time and exit, forgetting about it until the next time you really want to play and it is very positive for me in this days).
 A negative point is you already got the game with money and you don´t have too many cosmetics and the battlepass is not free... that is bad from the devs. The character edition feels cool, but maybe they can do it better without make you pay  extra money, they should rewards the people who bought it more !
 Maybe when it is on sales it is 100% recommended to buy, 25€ is worth... but when the prize gets down you will feel like expending on someone so cool.
---------
El juego esta de pm, es como un FIFA donde todo el mundo controla un único jugador, en cada partida te tocará bajar a defender, chupar bola y tocarte los huevos en la delantera a ver si te dan un pase largo, subir la bola en rol carrilero o dar pases al hueco tipo Modrick en la época que ficho por el Madrid o Guti.
  Si eres de los que se irrita cuando los compañeros son torpes, no te lo recomiendo porque vas a ver un poco de todo y es bastante caótico (pero a la vez muy divertido) y la gente va a estar aprendiendo xD, pero de ahí lo divertido y emoción y el implicarte a bajar a defender, cortar balones, ponerlos o tirar del equipo, etc. Mola mil, típico juego que echas unas partidas y dices bueno lo voy a ir dejando, la última... y luego a la 5º partida lo vuelves a decir.
 Tiene un toquecín Rocket League la verdad pero se siente muchísimo más distinto.

En comparación a la BETA; ahora comprendes cómo pasar la bola efectivamente sin que se te vaya a Cuenca, el tutorial es más completo, no se ven bugs visibles en mecánica y el portero ha mejorado mucho. Los mapas no se cambian unos por otros ni laguean tanto (por ahora).

 Los desarrolladores son los creadores de Absolver y SIFU (no tiene que ver con Rocket League), lo notarás porque los jugadores tienen la cara como el de SIFU xD y con pecas (se las puedes quitar). En fin, es un 100% worth, quizás por 25 € si no vas sobrado se siente algo de duda, pero el día que baje un poco lo pillarás encantado ! ; )
 Otra cosa random pero que mola es que te puedes hacer un pj masculino o una wifu (mujer) xD, aunque las opciones de creación de personaje y cosméticos son limitadas y no de para tanto, cosa que si los desarrolladores lo leen se lo dejo caer. Los cosméticos nuevos van a ir ligado al pase de batalla que no siendo un juego gratuito no mola y por ahora no vas a querer comprar, etc y no hay tanta variedad (es algo a mejorar). Por lo demás todo guay ! el juego corre bien incluso en pcs viejunos (el mío es un I5- 3570 con la 1080 TI ) En resumen, el juego es muy divertido y el típico que no tienes que entrar a farmear o por obligación de quests, sino de entrar a echar una o unas partidas rápidas y YA.

3rd review after 20 hours: I've sunk enough hours into this game and it's getting to the point where I'm looking at the match timer the same way I used to look at a clock in grade school. The game is half-baked in so many ways:
- no way to report players
- mouse passing is so unreliable - I feel I have a okay handle on it but still feel like I'm wrestling with controls 20 hours later - the rainbow flick is so ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ annoying it's like they intentionally made mechanics to reward players trying to 1v1 the whole team
- no push to talk
- no 1v1 quick play option
- extremely rudimentry practice options ... no vs computer mode which 90s gameboy pocket games had sorted
- dribbling is so annoying ... should be a button to suck into the ball without punting it away for you ... 

I'm kinda of speechless at how underbaked this game is ... This is the very definition of a MVP in the software sense. So much wrestling with controls. It's a shame bc the game has potential.

---

Never would I have believed I would enjoy a football game so much, having zero interest in this sport in the first place.

It's a unique take on the genre, great fun with friends, with tactical depth when you start organizing, and technical depth once you get the hang of the controls. Each game you try to come up, as a team, with new ways to outwit and outskill the opponent, be they attacker, defender, or goalie. Scoring obviously feels great, but passing to your mate for an amazing goal does just as much, and funny plays can also emerge from confusing chaos from time to time. Your character controls smoothly, you always have something you think you can improve on (efficiently passing the ball is a challenge at first), and you truly feel like you are the one responsible for the impressive actions that are performed on screen.
I noticed myself getting sucked in by the mood, sometimes screaming in amazement from an impressive action, feeling the rush of adrenaline when in a tight spot, being proud of my friends for their actions, and crashing in relief when securing a save we desperately needed. The action being so fast-paced and non-stop clearly has a lot to play in it.

Some nice customization too, with a lot to unlock by just playing the game (for quite an extensive time), be it for your character or even for the mood of the stadium.
Looking forward to how the game will evolve over time! Great job team 👍

[h1]Hablemos de lo obvio[/h1]
[list]
    [*]¿Tiene bugs y fallos de conexión (en la semana del lanzamiento)? [b]Sí[/b].
    [*]¿La gente no es cooperativa en un 100% juego de equipos? [b]Sí[/b].
    [*]¿Tiene microtransacciones a pesar de ser un juego de pago? [b]Sí[/b].
[/list]

¿Y sabéis qué? Todo eso... [b]DA IGUAL[/b].
[list]
    [*] Los fallos se van a arreglar si o si. Dadle unas semanas. [i]Sloclap[/i] ha demostrado ser un sello de calidad con sus juegos anteriores. Al igual que alguien que prueba a innovar y experimentar, es normal que las cosas nos salgan perfectas de primeras.
    [*] Pasaba en el colegio y pasa aquí. Todos quieren ser la estrella. Y pasará en todos los juegos de equipo, quieras o no. No tiene solución. Excepto que con el tiempo, el matchmaking empezará a coger forma y nos pondrá a cada uno en nuestro lugar. La gente también aprenderá a jugar mejor y darse cuenta de que haciendo pases se ganan más puntos que marcando.
    [*] Es muy cliché esto pero: son cosméticos. Incluso a diferencia de otros juegos, puedes ganar una moneda solo jugando y desbloquear cosas aparte. Además, el pase de batalla te permite ganar la moneda real para, en un futuro, poder tener el pase sin gastar nada. Ah, y no olvidar que el juego cuesta tres veces menos que los demás títulos que salen hoy en día.
[/list]

[h1]Si, pero... ¿Qué pasa con el juego?[/h1]
La razón de que me haya puesto así al comienzo es muy sencilla. Creo que se le está dando demasiada importancia a los puntos de arriba sin llegar a hablar del juego en sí. Y como no puedo ignorarlo, aporto una visión más [i]positiva[/i] y [i]optimista[/i] para equilibrar las cosas.
Por que en realidad, aquí hay solo una cosa que discutir, y es el hecho de que en un monopolio de juegos de fútbol genéricos, que año tras año, no han aportado nada como videojuegos, tengamos por fin algo [b]único[/b]. La última vez que pasó algo así fue con [i]Rocket League[/i] y, ojo, spoiler, [b]¡fue hace 10 años![/b]
Si, no se merece el mérito solo por darnos algo fresco en un género estancado, pero... no es lo único que hace.

[h1]Rocket League pero con personas[/h1]
Si, suena muy tonto, pero a la vez creo que es la mejor manera de resumirlo. Usaré [i]Rocket League[/i] como comparación porque realmente no hay nada más en el mercado que sea similar.
Cuando salió, la gente solo lo veía como un jueguito de coches con una pelota muy grande. Muchos [i]jajas[/i] asegurados. Luego la gente empezó a darse cuenta de que se podía volar. Luego que se podía aprovechar el campo como herramienta. Y al final tenemos un claro juego de "fácil de aprender, difícil de dominar" por toda la profundidad de mecánicas que ofrecía.
[i]Rematch[/i] es igual. A simple vista parece un juego de fútbol callejero con regates chulos. Pero en lo profundo, hay tantas estrategias que se van a ir descubriendo, tantas técnicas que se van a volver META para luego quedar anticuadas en un mes.
Y a diferencia de [i]Rocket League[/i], tenemos la opción de poder ser más cooperativos con nuestros compañeros y no depender tanto de las físicas de la pelota o el azar. Un equipo coordinado será el mayor rival que tendrás.

[h1]Un juego de fútbol para todos[/h1]
No consumo el "fútbol". Me gusta el deporte en sí, pero no sigo ninguna liga ni mundial.
Y aún así, [i]Rematch[/i] ha conseguido engancharme cuando ningún juego competitivo lo ha hecho en los últimos años. Tiene ese balance perfecto de juego casual y profesional. Ese nivel de profundidad que ya he mencionado antes, que te dan ganas de mejorar y aprender cosas nuevas. De querer experimentar tanto para ganar como para divertirte.
Apenas suelo aprovechar las betas o los fines de semana "gratis" de Steam, pero esto lo exprimí cada minuto que tenía disponible.
Tiene un creador de personajes muy completo, con muchiiiiiiiisima ropa. Me encanta el estar creando cada rato personajes con estilos diferentes, desde uniformes de fútbol de los 80s hasta raperos futoristas con diseños urbanos.
Los campos son preciosos. Me muero de ganas de ver todos los que van a añadir y ver sus animaciones a la hora de marcar.
¿Y las animaciones? Imagina a la gente que hizo [i]SIFU[/i] inspirándose en los movimientos de Ronaldinho.

¿Es perfecto? Probablemente no. Siento que le faltan algunas funciones sociales, un par de parches de balanceo, etc.
Cosas que sin duda se irán añadiendo y que tampoco me amargan la experiencia actual.

Y es que al final es esto, es un producto hecho con muchas pasión y cariño, donde lo que importa al final es pasarlo bien. 
Y chico... [b]yo me lo estoy pasando genial[/b].

I'm really enjoying playing the game, the gameplay is solid, and the core idea is excellent. However, I'm leaving a negative review (even though I bought the Elite version) because there are several issues that I think need to be addressed:

1. Voice Chat Issues
I can't consistently use voice chat with my teammates. It randomly stops working during matches, and we end up having to switch to Discord.

2. Network Sync Problems
The game constantly desyncs from the servers. I can usually claim my battle pass rewards when I log in for the first time, but after playing 3 to 4 matches, things start to break, rewards stop syncing properly and actions feel delayed.

3. Frequent Crashes
Both I and my friends have experienced multiple crashes during matches, the same thing that happened during the beta. Since we like playing 4v4, there's no way to return to the game after a crash (there’s no reconnect feature in casual mode, and 4v4 doesn’t even exist in ranked).

4. Lack of Content Between Beta and Launch
Between beta and full release, there’s barely any new content. Ronaldinho and a few skins, and, that’s it? Where are the new competitive game modes? I’d love to see competitive 4v4.

5. No Offline or Local Content
There was some hype around a potential story or career mode, but there’s absolutely nothing to do offline. Why tease it if it wasn’t going to be delivered?

6. Missing Polish and Core Features
There are still several missing quality-of-life elements:

No penalties for players who quit (even in casual).

No multi-mode matchmaking (can’t queue for both 4v4 and 5v5 at the same time).

Training mode is too basic and lacks options.

Customization is fun, but item variety is low.

Optimization needs improvement, for example, disabling the crowd gave me a big FPS boost (from 90 to 120).

That’s everything I could remember. I really want to see this game succeed, it has potential, but right now, it needs a lot of work.

The game is fun, but right now it's a broken mess that wouldn't be okay even for a f2p title, even less for a 25€ product.
Menus are broken, matchmaking is broken, lag is incredibly bad, there is no crossplay even. 
If you stop the matchmaking the game KEEPS FINDING A GAME and throws you into one even if you told it to stop. Rebinding inputs works SOME times and other times you get them reset randomly. Matchmaking is just ♥♥♥♥, there's no other word for it, it takes up to 5 minutes sometimes to find a match and it matches people from all leagues (a gold player CAN queue with a bronze player lol). 
Crashes are VERY frequent. Know at least 5 people that have been complaining about frequent crashes and I had it crash on me 4 times so far.

It's a broken mess, the game never left alpha stage. And I know because I was there testing the alpha technical test, it's still the same game with the same problems. 
Can't recommend this in this state.

Играю с релиза, по началу +- было всё хорошо, играли вместе с друзьями без проблем, но потом после нескольких обнов были проблемы с подключением на матч, причём мы в основном с ребятами играли втроём и в катку из нас троих заходили двое, либо вообще один. А сейчас на момент написания обзора проблема с разрешением, игра во время матча свернулось в окно, после сыгранной катки вернул обратно. Однако разрешение полностью сломалось, когда ставлю 1920 на 1080. Рамки по краям срезались и что главное: это говно ещё поставилось на компьютер! Я в ахере, после нескольких смен в итоге у меня компьютер сам перезагрузился, не выдержав аттракцион смен сломанных разрешений. Игру пытаются починить с одной стороны, а она в итоге ломается с другой.

Rematch est une excellente surprise ! Le gameplay est fluide, dynamique et super plaisant à prendre en main. On ressent vraiment la nervosité et l’intensité des matchs, c’est fun et addictif, surtout entre amis. Le style arcade est parfaitement dosé, et chaque partie donne envie d’en relancer une autre.

Mention spéciale pour les décors futuristes et colorés, qui apportent une vraie identité visuelle au jeu. L’esthétique est réussie, avec des arènes variées et immersives qui renforcent le plaisir de jeu.

Petit bémol cependant : quelques latences et bugs mineurs viennent parfois casser le rythme, mais rien de rédhibitoire, surtout si le studio continue à suivre le jeu de près.
Bravo aux devs, c’est un jeu qui a un vrai potentiel et qui mérite d’être connu. Hâte de voir ce que vous nous réservez pour la suite !

The core game play of REMATCH is awesome.
Really fun, many options and feels pretty intuitive. Maybe the funnest football game play I've ever seen. And i will highly recommend giving this game a go if you enjoy football games.

I do have some points of critique, most of which i expect to be fixed/solved in the coming weeks. and some that may end up killing the game.

- Early game bugs/ server issues are here. But the devs seem to be working hard to fix those.
- The game has season passes, and personally i think that the pricing is too aggressive.
You have to buy every season pass with real money. you cant grind for them so far. you get some gold back while completing the pass, but not even half of what you'll need for the next one. In my opinion this is bad in Free-to-play games. But its kind of outrageous in a game that you pay for. 

So if you buy this game, expect to have to put in another 10 bucks every season.

There are cosmetics you can grind with a separate currency and so far these seem reasonably priced.


- My other main critique is that the game is pretty bare-boned. Whats here is really fun, but there is VERY little variety. 
Its just 3v3, 4v4 or 5v5 casual matches and 5v5 ranked mode. And no challenges beyond a daily win.
This is going to get stale soon. But the developers seem to know this and are working on content updates. I think the longevity of this game depends on how soon those come out/how good they are.

The Core game play is great and the developers seem passionate so i hope the game will succeed.

[h1]Rematch – Il caos più divertente mai visto su un campo da calcio[/h1]

[b]Premessa tecnica importante:[/b]
Se avete partecipato al Rematch Beta Test, [u]vi consiglio vivamente di eliminare la cartella Runtime in YourUser\AppData\Local[/u].
Questo piccolo passo può risparmiarvi crash, errori all'inizio delle code, problemi legati alle impostazioni e perdita di controlli sul personaggio.

[hr]

[h2]Gameplay[/h2]
[b]È divertente? Sì, tantissimo.[/b]
Dai tempi di Rocket League non mi divertivo così con un amico.
Rematch è [i]facile da approcciare, difficile da padroneggiare[/i]: il classico "easy to learn, hard to master".
Un gioco arcade calcistico che strizza l’occhio sia a FIFA Street che a Rocket League, con un pizzico di caos alla “Blue Lock” – sì, parlo proprio di voi che correte da soli per tutto il campo ignorando ogni possibilità di passaggio. 😅

[h2]Teamwork? Praticamente assente.[/h2]
[b]Please. Pass. The. Ball. 🙏[/b]
La frustrazione più grande deriva dal matchmaking casuale: anche in ranked, l’unica modalità disponibile è 5v5, e se non avete un team organizzato, dovrete sperare nella buona volontà degli sconosciuti.
[quote]“Il gioco diventa frustrante se lo giochi con chi non sa giocarlo!”[/quote]

[h2]Performance e bug[/h2]
Gira bene anche su un tostapane, ma... [i]Unreal Engine strikes again.[/i]
[list]
[]Crash sporadici (7 in 20 ore per me, decisamente troppi).
[]Problemi di netcode e desync frequenti.
[*]Contrasti e parate che sembrano decisi dal dado di D&D.
[/list]
Il gioco è in Early Access, ma spesso sembra più una Beta mascherata, e questo potrebbe far innervosire chi sperava in un'esperienza più stabile.

[h2]Atmosfera e potenziale[/h2]
Rematch mi ha ricordato [b]Galactic Football[/b], e sogno già una collaborazione per mappe o skin ispirate.
Lo stile è semplice ma efficace, i comandi col pad risultano intuitivi dopo un po’ di rodaggio (da tastiera, invece, meno raccomandabile).
Nonostante tutti i problemi attuali, [b]c’è un’anima forte dietro questo progetto[/b], e si percepisce la passione di chi ci sta lavorando.

[hr]

[h2]Conclusione[/h2]
Rematch è un gioco pieno di difetti, ma anche pieno di potenziale.
Ha bisogno di tempo, di patch, e soprattutto di una community disposta a collaborare – [i]letteralmente[/i], passandosi la palla.
Lo consiglio, [b]ma con riserva e pazienza.[/b] Se gli sviluppatori riusciranno a sistemare i problemi principali e introdurre nuove modalità (es. [b]ranked 3v3[/b]), potrebbe diventare davvero qualcosa di speciale.

[b]Stato attuale: Consigliato con cautela – ma fiducioso.[/b]
Se fallirà nei prossimi mesi, tornerò a modificare la recensione.

[hr]

[i]Giocato 20+ ore, aggiornerò nel tempo con ogni major patch.[/i]

Wie das ständige Dribbeln und Foulen das Spiel kaputt machen

Meine neue Kritik zu Rematch nach ein paar Tagen Zockerei.

Ich werde erst Pro sowie auch Contra bei dem Spiel erwähnen:

Contra bei Rematch:

Ich finde, dieses ständige Foulen und Tricksen kann mit der Zeit auch mega nerven beim Spielen. Natürlich gehören Tricksen und Foulen zum Fußball dazu, aber für mich kommt das zu oft vor, sodass es einfach weniger Bock macht. Natürlich sollte das Spiel eine Ähnlichkeit mit Rocket League und Fortnite haben. Aber ich würde dieses Spiel nie besser als Rocket League oder FIFA einstufen.

Auch was ich etwas kritisch empfinde, ist, dass die Spieler ständig Alleingänge mit ihrem Dribbling oder Rainbow Flick machen und dadurch die Zusammenarbeit im Team zerstören. Es nervt einfach bei jedem Spiel, dass mich jemand mit seinem Rainbow Flick immer herumtrickst. Auch dieses ständige Foulen, wie erwähnt, nervt einfach nur.

Auch blöd finde ich es, dass jemand zu schnell aufgibt, nur wegen eines Gegentores. Manchmal gebe ich auch selber auf, weil ich ja einsehe, dass ich verloren habe. Für mich ist das eben ein Unterschied, aber ich habe nie wegen eines Gegentores aufgegeben. Ich finde diese Aufgeberei auch etwas blöd und nervig – da könnte man was machen.

Was das Spiel noch negativ beeinflusst, ist, dass es keinen Offline-Modus gibt wie bei Rocket League, wo man gegen andere Mannschaften durch Tabellen schlagen kann – als Übung! Was das Spiel an sich noch kaputt macht, ist, dass es wenige Inhalte gibt. Natürlich ist das Spiel neu und wird sich in den nächsten Jahren eh stark verändern – ähnlich wie bei Fortnite. Aber trotzdem hätte man vielleicht schon zwei Modi mehr hinzufügen können, oder?

Ein kleiner Punkt noch, den ich negativ erwähnen muss: Beim Schießen ist die Steuerung etwas unsinnig. Es ist Fußball und kein Shooter-Spiel. Ich hasse es, wenn ich ins Tor schießen möchte, dass ich – wie bei einer Waffe – ganz genau zielen muss. Darüber könnte man eine bessere Lösung im Spiel anbieten.

Und das sind die Gründe, warum der Spielspaß schneller verloren geht.

Pro:

Was ich aber gut finde bei dem Spiel, ist, dass vieles einfacher ist. Beim Tricksen ist es etwas leichter als bei FIFA oder PES. Bei FIFA ist das Dribbeln eine richtige Übungssache. Ich finde es cool, dass es etwas einfacher und kinderfreundlicher gestaltet ist.

Die Grafik ist in Ordnung, läuft an manchen Stellen flüssig, aber manchmal stürzt das Spiel ab – was aber eher selten passiert. Was ich auch positiv finde, ist, dass es an Rocket League angelehnt ist – auch dieses 3vs3 oder 4vs4 oder 5vs5, wo man mit anderen Leuten online spielen kann.

Ich finde es auch toll, dass man von Bronze zu Silber aufsteigen kann, um zu sehen, wie man sich verbessert hat.

Dennoch nutzen die Spielentwickler das Potenzial wenig aus!
Ich hoffe, sie nehmen diese Kritik ernst und verbessern das Spiel weiter. Ich würde das Spiel nur den Leuten empfehlen, die Freunde haben oder Bock auf etwas Neues haben. Empfehlen würde ich das Spiel jetzt nicht unbedingt.

Mein Fazit zum Preis:
Da das Spiel neu ist, würde ich den Preis als angemessen empfinden. Für 25 € ist es okay für eine Standard-Edition – wenn man es mit FIFA vergleicht. Meine Bewertung ist eine 6 von 10.

Mais pensez pas à prendre plaisir à jouer avec une communauté qui sait jouer que d'une seule manière, c'est à dire : frapper la balle au dessus du but pour ensuite faire un re-direct. 95% de chance de mettre la balle dans le goal après cette action.

Entre amis on veut jouer avec les passes, faire du beau jeu, du football quoi, mais la partie est toujours gâchée à cause de ceux là.

De plus, les joueurs de ton équipe qui se pensent seul sur le terrain à ne faire aucune passe, ne pas vouloir aller au goal, c'est vraiment un truc qui rend fou.

Le jeu est bien, mais soyez avec des amis et PAS en solo.

Niveau manette, c'est la cata... pour faire une passe il faut viser avec le joystick gauche mais pour tirer, avec celui de droite ! Aucunement instinctif.

Idée personnelle : 

Mettre en place un systeme qui OBLIGE un des joueurs à être gardien jsuqu'au prochain goal allié/ennemi, pour éviter de se retrouver sans gardien lors de la défence, avec une zone à respecter à ne pas franchir.

Si je devais mettre une note GLOBAL du jeu sur 10, je mettrai 6/10.

※マッチングが全然せず低評価にしていましたが、アップデートで改善されたので高評価にします。今後もアップデートでより良いゲームになることを期待しています※

・クロスプレイがないのがもったいなさすぎるので大至急実装してほしい。
・ゲームが時々クラッシュする。設定を下げたりTSRをオフにしたら改善された気がするが、一度PCごとクラッシュしたこともあった。
・ボールが動かなくなるなど、プレイに支障のあるバグがある。ちょうどゴールしたタイミングの試合に途中参加すると動けなくなるバグは早急に直してほしい。
・ラストアタックのシステムは絶対改善すべき。
・時々当たり判定に疑問がある。
・ボタン割り当てがカスタマイズできるようになれば便利。
・人口が分散するので、モードを減らした方がいいと思う。
・通報機能がほしい。
正直値段が少し高く感じましたが、ベータでハマったので製品版も購入しました。ゲームはとても楽しいのですが上記のような不満はあります。これらが解消されたらもっと良いゲームになると思います。

This game is great. It's literally rocket league but with people lol. I will say there are some things to note before buying. 
1. There are still a few bugs lurking here and there. I personally haven't experienced anything too game breaking myself but I think it's still worth mentioning.
2. The game is expensive. $30 is kind of a high price tag for a game like this. Content is fairly limited, the ranked system is pretty bare bones, and you'll still have to pay extra if you want the battle pass/cosmetics. That being said, If you're into the sports genre, Rematch is definitely worth the price.

Extremely fun with friends, definitely the perfect game for anyone seeking something different and fresh from the sports genre.

Still some bugs, not concerning this early on. The devs reacted very fast to some serious game issues coming with hotfixes on day 1 and day 2 of the pre-release. Reacted immediately when the servers got issues so I'm very pleased with the reactivity of Sloclap. I've only crashed 3-4 times in my 36 hours of gameplay.

But my biggest gripe right now is some slight inconsistencies that make high level gameplay frustrating sometimes (priority over other players when getting the ball seems random? Most of the time an enemy is a brick wall but they seem to run straight through me, not being able to control the ball when it's going at high speed even if the little icon is up).

But I'm confident all of this will get smoothed out, so I'm excited to see what's next and in the meantime I'll be fully enjoying myself on the pitch !

although i give a minus point for releasing the game without finishing it and making some obvious mistakes like not preparing good servers, the game recovered itself very goodly.

- The crashing problems seem to be so less, they made couple o' fixes and now crash problems are so rare(at least i didn't had any so far after the fixes).

As right now i recommend the game BUT IF the game has a DISCOUNT. i think paying up to 20 dollars for an online game is too much. The game is good but quite expensive, but if you want to spend good time with you can buy the game I RECOMMEND THE GAME BUT IT'S EXPENSIVE.

Плюсы:
- Вариативность. Благодаря талантливым программистам вы можете сейвить мяч внутри ворот. Забирать и выбивать мяч у себя на экране, но не в игре. Мотивировать промахи и ошибки тиммейтов фразами "Отлично" и "Спасибо".
- Футбол без правил. Сама игра заставляет вас нарушать стереотипные правила футбола и поощряет вас за это (при заднем подкате в ноги энеми - вы роняете это тело + сбиваете стамину игроку прям как курьеры людей во время доставки  ЯндексЕды. 
- Картинка. Спасибо деду за риот геймс (валорант) мультяшная, но идеально подходит для данного шедевра.
- Оптимизация. Запустится даже на нетбуке, джостик подключается. Провисания в игре только из за серверов и качества соединения.
- Фан особенно если играете в пати. Много нового вам предстоит узнать от людей, которых вы называете "Друзья". После 10 матчей совместной игры вам подберут имя из Блюлока и обязательно будут указывать ошибки еще на стадии планирования вас как человека.

Минусы:
- Блюлокеры, люди которые копируют поведение и внешность из мультика в игру
- Союзники, не умеющие выстроить цепочку своих действий в последствии чего тупо теряют мяч в ногах энеми.
- Эгоисты, млекопитающие, которые бьют по воротам при первом соприкосновении с мячом.
-Рыболовы, отдельная каста чемпионов, которые после начала игры автоматически присоединяются к команде соперника в качестве защитника и стоят в штрафной зоне всю игру.

Итог:

Даже со всеми минусами данного продукта рекомендую к покупке. Игра годная и очень увлекательная.

I'm dropping a negative review but I'm willing to change it with improvements to the game. I'm hoping the feedback I'm going to drop below will be useful to the devs. I really like this game and it has a ton of potential, so I'm being really critical in the hopes this gets the devs's attention.

For some context, I've played over 8000 hours of Rocket League in total. I know pretty well what makes a good physics-based / competitive title.

1. Servers: This game is in dire need of better servers. The mix of quick animations and wonky servers can make for a deeply frustrating experience when both clash in a nasty way.

There is nothing more frustrating than being a goalkeeper in this game with these servers. You will position yourself perfectly for an incoming shot, dive for the ball, hear the sound of you catching the ball (maybe even see your character catch the ball for a second) only for the ball to phase right through you and into the net. And the replay makes you look silly because at no point does it look like you made contact with the ball.

Sometimes defensively you'll also go for a sliding tackle, only for the ball to rubberband and nothing to happen, etc.

2. Crashes: This game will crash. Fortunately it's not often enough for it to be unplayable, but very clearly it's not due to the end-user. I've played with people and seen multiple people crash at the exact same time.

3. Bugs: There are a few bugs that immediately ruin the gaming experience. Main one is your character all of a sudden can't catch the ball at all, unfortunately I witnessed that once and it made the game borderline unplayable (had to quit the game for my sanity). Aside from that I've caught the ball as a goalie in the net, only to start coming out of the net and then all of a sudden a goal happens as if I own-goaled.

EDIT: I can no longer recommend the game - I haven't touched the game since the start of season one for any ranked games and slowly quit completely. While fun, there is nothing to keep you coming back to play whether you're at Elite or not. They try, through limited gamemodes etc, but it's just not enough. At this point in my honest opinion, I have to agree with the others, they are better off going F2P with a different monetization model, because currently you can have your fun in the game within Steam's 2 hour window, it's just not worth 25 euros.

I recently hit Elite, post patch 3 and the matchmaking update.

The game is very fun for where it is now, incrementally getting better as the devs push updates.
Playerbase seems divided on some gameplay changes, but I have been enjoying my gameplay way more now compared to the first two months after release.

Keep in mind that this is the first game of its type that the devs are working on, so if you keep that in mind going into this, you will have fun since most of the common and recurring frustrations have been fixed.

That said, there are still many things that can be improved, but since patch 3 and the matchmaking update, I'm enjoying my matches way, way more.

It's a buggy, laggy mess with janky controls and even though it makes passing ♥♥♥♥♥♥, mouse and keyboard is definitely better.

You lose control of the ball way too easily when running which again is worse with lag. 

They really need a text chat. The voice commands are toxic enough and it has VOIP so it's not like they're avoiding censorship. 

Please also do something about people being able to just run around the goalkeeper as soon as they get the ball to deflect / block. This is awful and I've seen two people doing it at once and it's just stupid.

tldr; Good idea, failed execution. 

Let me explain:

Server Stability
The game can't decide whether to put me in US West or Central but it doesn't matter because it lags anyway! For a game that was advertised as a "Competitive Single Player Controlled Soccer Game", it fails to deliver on server stability that feels like a mix of packet loss and straight up bad server code. It was an issue in the beta, and it seems like the only updates since then from the devs have been more cosmetics. Aside from the servers, my game crashes at least once every 2 hours without the ability to load back into the match with my party. 

Cosmetic Prices
As other reviews have stated, this game had no business charging $30+ then still plan to have an item shop that mirrors a FTP game. 

Queue Times
This game did not need 3 game modes + ranked 5v5 on launch. It's killing queue times and the lack of cross-play has made this games player count feel almost.... dead

In Conclusion 
As an early adopter of Absolver on PS4, it's sad to see that Sloclap has not learned their lesson with bad server stability, marketing, and greedy business practices. There's absolutely no reason to buy this game as it is, and I anticipate it being a dead game within a couple months based on the launch condition.

Đây là bài đánh giá của mình về REMATCH:
-Về Graphic: 
Vì được làm trên Unreal Engine 5 thế nên hình ảnh đương nhiên là đẹp và style đồ họa khá hợp gu với mình. Phần này cũng không có gì nói quá nhiều bởi game nào làm bởi Unreal Engine 5 hầu như đều đẹp cả.
-Về Gameplay:
Đây làm tựa game bóng đá mang lại cho mình cảm giác như đang tự mình đi đá bóng ở mấy cái sân 5 vậy. Việc điều khiển cầu thủ khá ổn nhất là chơi bằng bàn phím còn tay cầm mình vẫn còn thấy cách sắp xếp nút vẫn khá ngượng và phần nhắm đá trên tay cầm mình vẫn thấy khá là khó. Phần nên cải thiện trong phần này là vẫn khá ít skill bóng đá để múa nên mong sẽ được cập nhật thêm trong tương lai.
Điểm trừ lớn nhất chắc chắn là phần kết nối cũng như tính công bằng trong trận đấu:
*Dù mình dùng wifi 5G FPT nhưng vẫn có tình trạng giật hình và nhân vật "tốc biến" nhiều lúc. Mình cố thay đổi sever gần Việt Nam hơn nhưng có vẻ nhà phát hành chưa cho chỉnh phần này và để auto. Thế nên hãy cầu nguyện còn không lỡ bạn dính phải trận đấu ở châu âu thì xin chia buồn cho rank của bạn.
*Tính công bằng trận đấu chưa cao nhất ở những trận đấu casual. Nhà phát hành nên có 1 hệ thống tính elo ẩn để hỗ trợ việc ghép trận công bằng hơn. Ngoài ra việc người chơi toxic thoát giữa trận đấu cũng gây nhứt nhối cho nhiều game thủ. Mong rằng sẽ có 1 cơ chế trừng phạt những người chơi như vậy hoặc có thể giảm thiểu điều đó bằng 1 cái emote chửi chẳng hạn để team có ngu thì cũng có cái chửi tụi nó=)). Cũng nên có 1 cái report những hacker và người chơi thi đấu toxic.
-Cốt truyện: Game này làm gì có cốt truyện ( thật ra là có nó nằm hết ở Prologue) nên bỏ qua nha.
-Còn về phần game này hút máu không thì không nhá. Nếu bạn muốn mình ngầu thì ok bạn có thể bỏ tiền ra mua liền những nhân vật, sân thi đấu, vv... Tuy nhiên nếu bạn chơi thường thì cũng đã có đủ tiền trong game để mua đồ add cho nhân vật của bạn rồi. Với lại mấy món đồ đó cũng chỉ làm đẹp chứ không cho bạn thêm sức mạnh đâu.
****Tóm Lại****
Dù mới ra mắt REMATCH đã cho mình cảm giác chơi rất thú vị nhất là khi chơi cùng bạn bè. Nếu có thêm cross-play và cải thiện thêm về kết nối thì chắc chắn con game này sẽ cạnh trạnh với EA FC và E football đấy.

I currently have 18.5 hours in the game as I played before the full release. 
Here's the good, the game is addictive with really fun and engaging gameplay. Whether you prefer being goalie or attacker you are likely to have a GREAT time. I don't watch football (soccer for Americans) and I am still in love with this game.
But with that great time come a great amount of issues. 
Here's the bad. Biggest issue is definitely bugs and crashes. Throughout your matches you will likely encounter bugs (such as the ball not being synchronised in replays), the server disconnecting and sending you back to the main lobby mid-match, the game crashing (way too often) mid-match, matchmaking taking over 4 minutes at times and you'll have lag even if you have a good connection sometimes (they seem to be working on most of these issues, if not all).
It's great fun for those tired of Rocket League. Why be cars when you can be... human? 
Is it worth the price? For the fun alone, yes. If you care about games crashing and buggy games, I'd say not for now. If you get it at a discount or if they manage to fix these issues in a timely manner, absolutely. This game has potential to be huge and I hope the devs keep developing it. 
Remember, pass the ball and if you're a goalie, stay in the bloody penalty area... or else!

Worst Server Performance on Steam – Not Worth Your Money (Yet)

This is by far the laggiest game I’ve played on Steam. I can’t believe I paid for a game with servers in such a disastrous state. I experience packet loss in 90% of my matches, and the other 10% end in crashes.

To make matters worse, the game charges you upfront, then pushes in-game currency for cosmetics and — of course — a battle pass. You know what kind of games usually have battle passes? Free-to-play games, not ones you already paid for.

Queues take over 2 minutes, either because of the broken servers or because people are quitting due to the constant lag and instability.

Do yourself a favor: don’t spend your money on this yet. Wait until the developers fix the servers and improve the overall experience.

Je commence par la conclusion: 
[strike] ce n'est pas un mauvais jeu du tout, mais [/strike] le modèle économique clairement là pour essorer les pigeons laisse craindre une roadmap plus axé sur le contenu payant que sur le gameplay...
Juste pour ça j'aurais laissé un avis moyen si steam le permettait.

Il faut distinguer 2 choses dans ce jeu, le plaisir de jeu et le modèle économique.
Et hélas certaines imperfections de l'un ont un impact sur le ressenti de l'autre.

Plaisir de jeu ([strike] positif dans l'ensemble[/strike] ) :
- Oui c'est exigeant. Savoir quand lober, passer, tirer, tirer avec effet, tâcler, etc. on se sent un peu submergé d'infos au début.
- Oui certains bugs des bêtas sont toujours là (genre certains ballon passent à travers les bras/jambes, etc)
- Mais [strike] le plaisir est là[/strike]  car ça change des jeux de foot habituels
- Ca parait contre intuitif, mais c'est plus agréable à jouer clavier/souris (avis perso)
- Un petit nerf sur les sombreros ? Histoire de voir des games avec d'autres moves que ça.

Modèle économique (gros point négatif) :
- la moindre chose un peu fancy demande votre argent tout le temps... partout...
- impression d'être sur CoD ou autre du genre
- c'est compréhensible pour un jeu free to play mais pour un jeu payant, c'est pas tolérable
- l'accès anticipé lui aussi absurdement cher

В игре мало серверов, мало пока-что вещей в магазине (они почти все в настройках персонажа). Разделение бп на 3 этапа в 90 дней чересчур много, его можно закрыть за месяц не парясь. Тут ждут больше разных вещей как показали в трейлере игры сейчас, нельзя поставить 2 протеза на ноги и руки. Недочёты в плане забивания голов и зависания клиента у всех кто на поле (у кого-то из-за этого происходит краш игры). Коллаборация с одним Роналдиньо и кепкой баленсиагой слишком как-то ну хз. Если они не будут ограничивать малым наличием коллаб и вещей, особенно что в бп, то будет норм. Бетка показала плоды в 200к онлайн, но уже видно что будет играть мало людей с ценником в 20 баксов, дети не купят, а люди что подумывают не решаться отдать за это. Игру спасёт цена в 700 рублей + коллаборации ультимативные и огромный магазин вещей. Насчёт доната он тут поверхностный и по хорошему можно играть фри ту плей, большинство вещей можно приобрести просто за игровую валюту а не донат. НАДЕЮСЬ игра будет жива, особенно серваки... Удачи всем на поле и да, поменьше вам эгоистов, выходцев из голубой тюрьмы

An excellent small scale football game, that ditches anything that would slow the game down. The controls give you a lot of freedom but are not too complicated. Passing is skill, since the passes are not magnetized to your teammates, you actually have to aim (and lead) your passes properly. Same with shooting. It really makes me feel like when I played Rocket League for the first time.

A lot of things outside of the gameplay are somewhat jank. Some of the color options for away team are limited. The game still crashes too often for my liking. The matches sometimes lag. Some of the menus are not good. But the core of the game is so strong, that I'm ready to look past some of the problem and just hope Slowclap can most of them moving forward.

Rematch — симулятор того, как тебе снова напомнят, почему футбол — это величайшее разочарование человечества.

Ты запускаешь игру. Всё вроде норм. Менюшка, выбор матча. И тут — БАЦ.
Музыка.
Это не музыка. Это обряд.
Уга-чуга, ба-бам, какие-то племенные крики, как будто ты не в футбольный матч зашёл, а в шалаш к колдуну, где тебя сейчас будут жарить с картошкой. Я чуть зубы не сломал от напряжения. Честно, у меня сработал инстинкт: выйти из квартиры, обоссать роутер и уехать в деревню, чтобы это не повторилось.

Там такие биты, что у тебя мозг сжимается в узел, и кажется, будто рядом кто-то начинает трясти маракасами в лицо. Я не удивлюсь, если музыку для Rematch записывали в африканской глубинке на диктофон, пока кого-то били палкой по тазу.

А потом начинается сам "футбол".
Футбол. Вот это слово. Ебучее, унылое слово.
Вся суть этого "вида спорта" — гоняться за мячом, который постоянно куда-то катится, сраный вратарь прыгает как оладушек на сковородке, а тиммейты занимаются ♥♥♥ пойми чем. Это даже в жизни так — один бегает, другой валяется, третий орёт "пас!", но сам никогда его не даёт.

А тут — это всё усугублено.
Каждый матч — это как будто ты пришёл в психбольницу и сказал: "Ребят, давайте командную игру!" И все такие: "АААААА!" — и побежали в разные стороны, пинать стены. Один раз чувак просто сел на мяч и сидел. Второй бегал в ауте, видимо, пытался найти свою мать. Я орал. Но не от смеха — от боли.

Ты реально один против семи долбоёбов, и всё это под фон африканской ритуальной дискотеки, от которой у тебя начинается астральное расщепление личности. На фоне этого "матча" даже обычный школьный урок физры кажется организованным и логичным.

Футбол — это ♥♥♥♥♥. В жизни — унылое, вонючее действо, где все потеют, падают и делают вид, что это весело. А тут — это ещё и пиксельный цирк с ритуальным саундтреком, в котором ты страдаешь в реальном времени, за свои же мегабайты.

Rematch — не игра. Это пытка. Это когда тебе говорят: "Эй, может поиграем в футбол?" — и ты такой: "А можно сразу выстрелить мне в колено?"

Rematch - это отличный футбольный аркадный симулятор. По механикам что-то между Rocket League и Pro Soccer Online. Пока игра ещё очень сырая, много багов, вылетов, проще говоря нестабильна. Но даже так, она на уровень выше своих аналогов. Игре есть куда развиваться, например добавить возможность бить штрафные, добавить систему фолов, матчи с большим количеством участников. Тогда у Remacth есть шанс стать киберспортивной дисциплиной на уровне с FC

desconexion de los servidores

Yes, at first glance, this company might have a few games that made its name known, but if you ask me, these people don’t have the slightest clue about real software development, coding, or what it means to be a coder. They got lucky and made something by chance. Even the matchmaking system in the game is buggy because of poor coding, it takes 30 minutes just to find a match.

The simplest example I can give is this: you don’t necessarily have to press the specific pass button to pass the ball to a teammate, right? You can also pass by shooting. But the game interprets it as a shot, so it can instantly end the extra time as if you just took a random shot.

The wall pass mechanic in the game is actually great just like the rules in old-school street football but it can easily be abused. I’m honestly tired of seeing players use this tactic in every single match. It turns the game into something soulless. People just walk up to the goal, shoot at the wall, hit the rebound, and there's an animation bug there. The keeper often fails to react, even in situations where they should definitely be making the save.

They announced the game as a beta, saw it gaining some hype, and rushed the release just to cash in. Everyone plays football games, sure but here, we’re controlling the characters individually, so when a player doesn’t have the ball, it’s super easy to troll. There are even players trying to steal the ball from their own teammates. How do you launch a ranked system without building a structure to prevent that? There needs to be a point system that encourages people to play as goalkeepers or defenders.

If you start as the goalkeeper before kickoff, then you shouldn’t just leave the goal wide open. Yeah, the option to switch goalkeepers sounds nice on paper, but when the keeper rushes out, screws up, and suddenly the defender standing behind becomes the new goalie right as the striker is about to shoot how does that make sense? That’s just broken. Isn’t that clearly an exploit?

If there are already two players inside the box and the goalkeeper leaves it, the other player inside shouldn’t instantly become the new keeper. That’s unbelievably STUPID.

Ma una volta capite le meccaniche ed entrati nel giusto mood, una partita tira l'altra. Si comanda un singolo giocatore, quindi ogni singola azione ben fatta porta soddisfazioni. Già il solo posizionarsi bene, intercettare un passaggio o fare un bel passaggio da soddisfazioni. Una cosa strana che però ho riscontrato è che c'è l'audio italiano, ma parlano inglese. Nella patch del day one però l'audio era effettivamente italiano, fin quando non ho spento, riacceso il gioco per ritrovarmi l'audio di nuovo in inglese. In generale lo consiglio. Ma se non siete troppo tolleranti a qualche bug o glitch magari aspettate.

This game started out being incredibly fun, even if overpriced. However, on full release, servers and lag are unbearably bad. This isn't even considering the fact that the game **HEAVILY** favors players who do NOT have the ball, gimping any sort of control or handling efforts.

Examples:
1. The ball is at your feet but then teleports to an enemy who seemed to miss their tackle on you 2-3 seconds ago.

2. On the occasion you make a goal (goalies are absolute GODS in this game), don't celebrate too soon. Half the time, it will teleport back to the goalie's hands regardless.

3. Sweet! Matchmaking is done! Loading in. Oops, can't move? Gotta alt-f4 to fix it. RIP.

4. Many more bugs than I care to list. New game, fairly expected. Not the worst thing compared to the lag and "suction/magnet" handicap given to those who don't have the ball.

TL;DR I cannot currently recommend due to bad lag/servers. Many bugs. Terrible game mechanics.

I played this game since the beta so I actually has more hours into it than what's shown here. This game was super fun, it gives a fresh feeling to football game, and now the game has released and I bought it and tried it for a few hours and it's so much smoother than it was in beta. Customization still feels lacking tho but the gameplay is still super fun and honestly I only care for the gameplay. The only mistake the developer made is making people pay, as fun as this game is, I think this kind of game is more suited for a free to play live service type like for example ehem,,, rocket league. I think the price tag, and the fact that there's 3 game modes in quickmatch (3v3, 4v4, and 5v5) makes it so hard to find a match, it usually takes more than 5 minutes to find one (and sometimes more than 10 minutes) in Southeast Asia and the match lasts for only... 5 or so minutes? So my suggestion is, as a player who really enjoys the game and want the game to succeed, first, remove the 2 game modes (3v3, and 4v4) and only make it one (5v5), then second one is to add more customization that costs real money and make the game free (as to people who already bought the game, just compensate them with some exclusive pack or something I don't really care, I just want people to play this game so I myself could play).

Some of the smoothest mechanics I've encountered in awhile. The animations are satisfying, and the arenas look cool. Hoping to see more. There is an overabundance of violence in this Football game. No ref to throw a card when someone slides into your ankles, but there are counters to it. It feels almost like a fighting game trying to keep the ball away or steal it. Makes sense when the devs made Sifu. 

There does seem to be some matchmaking woes. Sometimes it pops pretty fast, but then sometimes it'll go 10, 15 minutes and not pop. And considering how many people are playing on release, the queue should be popping immediately. 

It's also interesting they released the game with 3 queues. 3v3, 4v4, and 5v5. The 5v5 feels like how the game is meant to be played, but the other two can be interesting. I'm not sure it's a good idea to split your playerbase up that much so soon though. 

Overall I'm loving the game. Once I get a full 5 of friends, as right now it's just the 3 of us, then I'm sure it'll be even more fun.
